global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a slender, streamlined body and long, pointed wings. It has a predominantly white plumage with a contrasting black cap on its head. The wings and tail are gray with a forked tail and red bill.

part_details.body: Slender and streamlined, predominantly white with a smooth texture.
part_details.wings: Long, pointed, gray with a slight curve, aiding in agile flight.
part_details.head: White with a distinctive black cap covering the top.
part_details.tail: Forked, gray, providing balance and maneuverability.
part_details.bill: Short, pointed, and bright red, contrasting with the plumage.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the top of the head, contrasting with the white face.
The long wings extend from the sides of the body, tapering to points.
The forked tail is positioned at the rear, aiding in flight control.
